input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.2.2
            TITLE: the energy meter must be installed in an easily accessible location

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.2.2: The Energy Meter must be installed in an easily accessible location
EV.3.2.2 The Energy Meter must be installed in an easily accessible location

final_answer: The Energy Meter must be installed in an easily accessible location
